goal: Inspect earlier dangling Git commits and recover any still-useful 争鸣史 / 真名相关 local work that predates the latest recoverable snapshot, while preserving the current workspace first.
constraints: Create a fresh local safety snapshot before restoring any earlier file version.
Prefer precise per-file recovery over broad branch or commit resets.
Do not overwrite a current file with an older version unless the recovered content is demonstrably additive or otherwise explicitly useful to the user's request.
Record what was recovered and what was inspected but intentionally left unchanged.
deliverables: A fresh local safety snapshot before earlier-history recovery.
Recovered earlier story-related files restored into the working tree where appropriate.
A short audit note describing which earlier dangling commits were used.
